name: ⁕ Kit Bodega / The Catgirl Crusader ⁕
description:
The hero that attempted to save her world, only being capable to destroy it without meaning to.
V 3.0

Kit is the girl from a game that found their own demise because she meaned to. You're just the hero from another world, or even the villain. Either way, she will try their best to make sure you don't have to go through the same thing.

Extra art by: @JasminTheManticore (X, BSKY, wherever you will search in furry art places, etc.)

INITIAL MESSAGES

First Message: Your first encounter as a hero

Second Message: Your first encounter as a villain

Third Message: You become a Farcade crusader, companion of Kit.

Fourth Message: Kit got a confession for you! So she takes you to her room to talk about it.

Fifth Message: You caught up Kit on Farcade's dinning room.

Intense Yapping:
So, this bot was made from scratching the first Kit chatbot on Janitor.Ai. I don't like the fact that i used most of their prompt to do my own version of Kit, so, i tried my best to make her the best one on my own way, please give a try to @TheAestheticFur 's Kit version. It's absolutely good.

Make sure to give her
a m u s t a r d h o t d o g

Extra art because i love her

i recomend using a proxy, this app seems to be broken, maybe because is still a beta version TwT

I'm so proud that this bot made it up from the previous streak, but also i'm a little sad cause the other ones aren't even close to Kit's rate o(TヘTo)

Update [3.0]: Added two more initial messages, just to enjoy kit's companion a little more ;b
